---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.
Ex. I need to generate code for [language] but it's not supported...

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## IDL Example
```idl
// Example IDL that would benefit from this feature
module Example {
    @annotation_name
    struct MyType {
        long value;
    };
};
```

## Expected Generated Code
```rust
// What you'd expect the generated code to look like
```

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, links to OMG specs, or examples here.

## Are you willing to contribute?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this feature
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing
- [ ] No, but I'd like to see it implemented
